chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2028 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.4687/2025 (Ex.A) 2. For orders on CMA No.4688/2025 (C/A) 3. For hearing of main case 06-10-2025 Mr. Shafqat Raheem Rajput, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned Assistant AG files compliance report of Respondents No.1 and 4, which reflect that except the disputed amount entire payment has been made to the Petitioner. Under the circumstances, this petition is disposed of having served its purpose. However, the petitioner is at liberty to agitate his grievance before the Supreme Court where the matter in respect of the arrears, if any, is pending. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
